name: ChatAd Land
publishCadence: New AI-labeled articles every Tuesday and Thursday.
tagline: Insights into SEO, GEO, and AEO for the AI search era.
contextFeedDescription: White-hat industry headlines in SEO, GEO, AEO, and AdTech. Each item links to the original publisher; ChatAd Land does not republish third-party full text.
about: ChatAd Land tracks the shift from search engines to answer engines: how AEO, GEO, and contextual ad placement work now that people ask AI instead of Googling. Published by IsraeliLeads.
